highlights: Fixed Flutter StorePage undefined controller references that blocked analyze and all builds
Flutter cancellation API now sends an explicit confirmation flag
Admin accounts return HTTP 403 before request validation
Legacy clients may omit confirmation while explicitly false confirmation remains rejected
Added regression tests and source-package preflight checks for both failures
Preserved the 30-day account recovery and permanent purge lifecycle
external_configuration_required: Laravel Scheduler must run every minute in production
WARQNA_API_URL must point to the deployed HTTPS Laravel API
Google, Facebook and Apple OAuth credentials remain required for social login
